module_description: User-owned crypto watchlists with 30d performance and public sharing.

page.title: My watchlists
page.subtitle: Active lists, managed only by you. Track 30d performance and share them publicly whenever you want.
page.subtitle_with_cap: {count} of {cap} active lists. Track 30d performance and share them publicly whenever you want.
page.empty_description: Create your first watchlist to track your favourite crypto and see how the basket moves over time.
page.cap_reached_hint: You've reached the {cap} watchlist cap. Archive one to free up a slot.

overview.perf_subtitle: Weighted average across {watchlists, plural, one {# watchlist} other {# watchlists}} · {coins, plural, one {# coin total} other {# coins total}} · last sync {sync}
overview.perf_subtitle_fallback: Add your first coins to see the performance

card.coins_count: {count, plural, =0 {no coin} one {# coin} other {# coins}}
card.follow_count: {count, plural, =0 {no follower} one {# follower} other {# followers}}

detail.coin_empty_description: Add coins to start tracking the basket performance.
detail.share_unavailable_private: Make the watchlist public to share its link

form.delete_description_with_coins: {count, plural, one {# coin} other {# coins}} you added will also be removed. This action is permanent.

add_coin.title: Add a coin
add_coin.description: Search by symbol or name. Only tracked coins can be added.

public_page.description_format: Crypto watchlist by @{username}. {count, plural, one {# coin} other {# coins}} tracked.

errors.watchlist_cap_reached: You have reached the maximum number of watchlists ({cap}). Archive or delete one before creating a new one.
errors.watchlist_coins_cap_reached: This watchlist is full ({cap} coins). Remove one before adding another.
errors.slug_taken: You already have a watchlist with this URL slug.
errors.name_required: Choose a name for your watchlist.
errors.name_too_long: The name is too long (max 64 characters).
errors.coin_not_supported: The coin {symbol} is not currently tracked.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds}s.
